results.title: Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake pre-order date may have leaked ahead of Switch 2 release
results.description: Buyers may not have to wait long to secure their copy of the Ocarina of Time remake. A leaked Google search result at GameStop revealed that pre-orders would start in a matter of weeks. A Nintendo Direct on the same day announcing a holiday release date for the Zelda game is also possible.

results.title: Indian Coach Shuts Down Virat Kohli-Gautam Gambhir Rift Rumours: 'They Speak At Least 10 Times'
results.description: There have been reports of Virat Kohli and Gautam Gambhir not on speaking terms.
